testcase.name: titleverify

failure.message: expected [Amazon.com: Online Shopping for Electronics, Apparel, Computers, Books, DVDs & more] but found [Amazon.com. Spend less. Smile more.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Amazon.com: Online Shopping for Electronics, Apparel, Computers, Books, DVDs & more] but found [Amazon.com. Spend less. Smile more.] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:110) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1413) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:149) at
